title: Initialize monorepo structure (Bolt - DevOps/Turborepo)
description: Set up a Turborepo-based monorepo with shared packages and applications.
details: Create apps/ and packages/ directories. Configure turbo.json with build, test, and lint pipelines. Add root tsconfig.json with path aliases.
test_strategy: Verify turbo build succeeds; verify workspace resolution works across packages

subtasks.title: Create root configuration files
subtasks.description: Set up turbo.json, root package.json with workspaces, and base tsconfig.
subtasks.details: Use pnpm workspaces. Set turbo cache to local only for now.
subtasks.test_strategy: Run turbo build from root, verify it discovers all workspaces.

subtasks.title: Configure shared ESLint and Prettier
subtasks.description: Create shared lint configuration package used by all workspaces.
subtasks.details: packages/eslint-config with flat config format. Include TypeScript, React, and Node.js rule sets.
subtasks.test_strategy: Run lint across all workspaces, verify no config errors.

title: Create shared UI component library (Blaze - TypeScript/React)
description: Build a design system with reusable React components using Tailwind CSS.
details: Create packages/ui with Button, Input, Modal, Table, and Card components. Use Radix UI primitives. Export both ESM and CJS.
test_strategy: Storybook visual tests for each component; unit tests for interactive behavior

subtasks.title: Set up component library scaffold
subtasks.description: Initialize the UI package with build tooling and Storybook.
subtasks.details: Use tsup for building. Configure Storybook 8 with Vite builder.
subtasks.test_strategy: Verify build outputs ESM and CJS; Storybook launches without errors.

subtasks.title: Implement Button component
subtasks.description: Fully styled Button with variants: primary, secondary, ghost, destructive.
subtasks.details: Support size variants (sm, md, lg), loading state, disabled state, and icon slots.
subtasks.test_strategy: Test all variant combinations render correctly; test click handlers fire.

subtasks.title: Implement Modal component
subtasks.description: Accessible modal dialog built on Radix Dialog primitive.
subtasks.details: Support title, description, close button, and custom content. Trap focus. Close on Escape.
subtasks.test_strategy: Test focus trapping, keyboard navigation, and aria attributes.

title: Set up PostgreSQL with migrations (Rex - Rust/SQLx)
description: Configure PostgreSQL database with migration system and connection pooling.
details: Use SQLx CLI for migrations. Configure connection pool with min 2, max 10 connections. Add health check query.
test_strategy: Verify migrations run forward and backward cleanly; test pool exhaustion handling

title: Build GraphQL API gateway (Grizz - Go/gqlgen)
description: Implement a GraphQL API gateway that federates multiple backend services.
details: Use gqlgen for type-safe GraphQL. Implement dataloaders for N+1 prevention. Add query complexity analysis.
test_strategy: Test each resolver; test dataloader batching; test complexity limits

subtasks.title: Define GraphQL schema
subtasks.description: Write .graphql schema files for User, Post, and Comment types.
subtasks.details: Include Query and Mutation root types. Add pagination with cursor-based connections.
subtasks.test_strategy: Schema validation passes; introspection returns expected types.

subtasks.title: Implement resolvers with dataloaders
subtasks.description: Write resolvers for all types with dataloader integration.
subtasks.details: Use per-request dataloader instances. Batch user lookups and post lookups.
subtasks.test_strategy: Verify batching reduces queries; test with concurrent requests.

title: Implement event sourcing system (Rex - Rust/Tokio)
description: Build an event store with append-only log and projection rebuilding.
details: Events stored in PostgreSQL with JSONB payload. Support snapshots every 100 events. Implement async projection workers.
test_strategy: Test event append, replay, snapshot creation; test projection consistency

subtasks.title: Create event store module
subtasks.description: Core event store with append, read, and snapshot operations.
subtasks.details: Use advisory locks for aggregate-level concurrency. Store events with version numbers.
subtasks.test_strategy: Test concurrent appends; verify ordering guarantees.

subtasks.title: Build projection engine
subtasks.description: Async workers that process events and build read models.
subtasks.details: Support checkpoint-based resumption. Handle projection failures with dead letter queue.
subtasks.test_strategy: Test checkpoint persistence; test failure recovery.

title: Create CLI tool for operations (Grizz - Go/Cobra)
description: Build a CLI tool for database management, migrations, and service health checks.
details: Use Cobra for command structure. Subcommands: db migrate, db seed, health check, config validate.
test_strategy: Test each subcommand with captured stdout; test error exit codes

subtasks.title: Scaffold Cobra CLI structure
subtasks.description: Set up root command with version flag and subcommand registration.
subtasks.details: Use persistent flags for --config and --verbose. Add bash completion generation.
subtasks.test_strategy: Verify help output; test flag parsing.

title: Build real-time notification service (Blaze - TypeScript/WebSocket)
description: WebSocket-based notification service with channel subscriptions and presence.
details: Use ws library with Redis pub/sub for horizontal scaling. Support user channels, topic channels, and broadcast.
test_strategy: Test connection lifecycle; test message delivery; test reconnection handling

subtasks.title: Implement WebSocket server
subtasks.description: Core WebSocket server with authentication and heartbeat.
subtasks.details: Authenticate via JWT in connection upgrade. Send ping every 30s, disconnect after 3 missed pongs.
subtasks.test_strategy: Test auth rejection; test heartbeat timeout.

subtasks.title: Add Redis pub/sub integration
subtasks.description: Bridge WebSocket channels to Redis pub/sub for multi-instance support.
subtasks.details: Each server instance subscribes to relevant Redis channels. Fan out messages to local WebSocket connections.
subtasks.test_strategy: Test cross-instance message delivery with two server instances.

subtasks.title: Implement presence tracking
subtasks.description: Track online/offline status and last-seen timestamps.
subtasks.details: Use Redis sorted sets with TTL for presence. Broadcast presence changes to subscribers.
subtasks.test_strategy: Test presence updates on connect/disconnect; test TTL expiry.

title: Implement rate limiting middleware (Grizz - Go/Redis)
description: Token bucket rate limiter with per-user and per-IP limits.
details: Use Redis for distributed rate limiting. Support configurable limits per endpoint. Return Retry-After header on 429.
test_strategy: Test rate limit enforcement; test header values; test Redis failure fallback

title: Set up observability stack (Bolt - DevOps/Kubernetes)
description: Deploy Prometheus, Grafana, and Loki for metrics, dashboards, and log aggregation.
details: Use Helm charts for deployment. Configure service discovery for Prometheus. Create default Grafana dashboards for API latency, error rates, and resource usage.
test_strategy: Verify Prometheus scrapes all targets; verify Grafana dashboards load; verify Loki receives logs

subtasks.title: Deploy Prometheus with Helm
subtasks.details: Configure 15-day retention. Add service monitors for all application pods.
subtasks.test_strategy: Verify targets are UP in Prometheus UI.

subtasks.title: Create Grafana dashboards
subtasks.description: Build dashboards for API, database, and infrastructure metrics.
subtasks.details: Use dashboard-as-code with grafana-operator. Include alert rules for SLOs.
subtasks.test_strategy: Import dashboards, verify panels render with test data.

title: Write end-to-end test suite (Tess - Testing/Playwright)
description: Comprehensive E2E tests covering critical user journeys through the application.
details: Use Playwright for browser automation. Test login flow, CRUD operations, real-time notifications, and error handling. Run in CI with retry on flaky tests.
test_strategy: All E2E tests pass in CI; maximum 2% flake rate; tests complete under 5 minutes

subtasks.title: Set up Playwright test infrastructure
subtasks.description: Configure Playwright with test fixtures, authentication helpers, and CI integration.
subtasks.details: Use global setup for authenticated state. Configure 3 browser projects: chromium, firefox, webkit.
subtasks.test_strategy: Verify all 3 browsers launch and can navigate to the app.

subtasks.title: Write authentication flow tests
subtasks.description: E2E tests for login, logout, token refresh, and session expiry.
subtasks.details: Test valid login, invalid credentials, account lockout, password reset flow.
subtasks.test_strategy: Each test isolated with fresh user; verify redirect and token state.

subtasks.title: Write CRUD operation tests
subtasks.description: E2E tests for creating, reading, updating, and deleting resources.
subtasks.details: Cover user profile CRUD, post CRUD, and comment CRUD. Test optimistic updates.
subtasks.test_strategy: Verify UI updates match API responses; test undo functionality.

options: Shard across workers with shared database
Static seed data with known IDs
No visual regression - rely on unit tests
